title: CBC
description: WBC low at 2.1; hemoglobin low at 8.1; platelets markedly decreased at 42.

title: Urinalysis
description: Positive nitrite and leukocyte esterase. Cloudy urine. Protein and glucose present. Reflex microscopy and urine culture triggered.

title: X-ray humerus findings
description: X-ray shoulder impression; lucency traverses the left scapular body compatible with nondisplaced fracture.

title: Assessment
description: Because symptoms were increasing and pain occurred at rest, the presentation was considered consistent with unstable angina and hospitalization was indicated.

title: Plan
description: Plan was to schedule cardiac catheterization because of the high pretest probability of coronary disease.
